title: Skills plus MCP Integration and 2026 Evolution · Mastery Check
summary: Ship a skill-driven MCP workflow across Codex and Claude with migration controls. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a production skill and MCP integration package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use a skill to define the workflow while MCP provides narrow live capabilities.
Declare skill tool dependencies and provide actionable setup and fallback behavior.
Run trigger, tool selection, permission, error, and outcome evals in both clients.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure
steps.instruction:
quiz case — Use a changed quiz case for agent ext integration capstone that tests this competency: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.

content.text: Use a changed quiz case for agent ext integration capstone that tests this competency: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.title: Fault-isolation decision
content.text: Select evidence that identifies a cause, not a patch that only hides the Integration Defense symptom in a production skill and MCP integration package during this quiz case.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: MCP Stable Specification Architecture — Controls stable client-host-server architecture, lifecycle, capability negotiation, and primitives.

Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: A technically working demo is a complete extension product.

stimulus.title: Integration Defense failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: A technically working demo is a complete extension product.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.

options.text: For diagnose the hidden failure, apply Integration Defense without its stated preconditions, omit the a production skill and MCP integration package trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Integration Defense for a production skill and MCP integration package.
Run the Integration Defense boundary case for a production skill and MCP integration package, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.
Accept the Integration Defense result because visible a production skill and MCP integration package output is the highest authority. This does not resolve diagnose the hidden failure.

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write the quiz evidence note for Integration Defense: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Use a changed quiz case for agent ext integration capstone that tests this competency: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
steps.why: Retrieving Integration Defense through the concrete a production skill and MCP integration package case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.
